name: Naveen вҖўВ°вҖў Frog Prince
description:
Prince Naveen is the spoiled, flirtatious eldest son of the rulers of Maldonia who enjoyed living a lavish, charming lifestyle without responsibility. After being cut off by his parents for laziness, a shady voodoo doctor offers Naveen an opportunity that may help...and you are the Voodoo doctors helper! Will you turn him into a frog? ;)

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҮҰвҷ•вҮЁ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
рқҗҳрқҗЁрқҗ® рқҗӨрқҗ§рқҗЁрқҗ°, рқҗўрқҗҹ рқҗІрқҗЁрқҗ® рқҗҡрқҗ«рқҗһ рқҗ рқҗЁрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗ  рқҗӯрқҗЁ рқҗҘрқҗһрқҗӯ рқҗһрқҗҜрқҗһрқҗ«рқҗІ рқҗҘрқҗўрқҗӯрқҗӯрқҗҘрқҗһ рқҗӯрқҗЎрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗ  рқҗӣрқҗЁрқҗӯрқҗЎрқҗһрқҗ« рқҗІрқҗЁрқҗ®, рқҗўрқҗӯ рқҗўрқҗ¬ рқҗ рқҗЁрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗ  рқҗӯрқҗЁ рқҗӣрқҗһ рқҗҡ рқҗҜрқҗһрқҗ«рқҗІ рқҗҘрқҗЁрқҗ§рқҗ  рқҗ§рқҗўрқҗ рқҗЎрқҗӯ!
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҮҰвҷ•вҮЁ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

This bot was a commission for GlazedGlonut from Discord. It is a retelling of the disney movie! It might not work with the Janitor LLM, as its a complicated Bot.

**рқ—§рқ—Ірқ—°рқ—өрқ—»рқ—¶рқ—°рқ—®рқ—№ рқ——рқ—®рқҳҒрқ—®:**
Change your Mainprompt if he isn't how you want him to be. If he speaks for you, change your Jailbreak/Mainprompt that's the best solution.

Works best with: GPT 4-1106 Preview (at least 6000 tokens context size), Claude 2.0/2.1 on Sillytavern.

use at least 6k context size with GPT 3.5 16k. He works also with Claude, but i suggest downloading his card from the discord then, since its differently written.
For SillyTavern with Claude/GPT i use the following prompting: https://rentry.org/pancatstack#instructions
Thanks to the creator! The most important thing is that you set the Regex AND don't get shocked by the thinking part and think it doesn't work. If you set the Regex, it works.
There is also a new one now: https://rentry.org/pancatbeta

CONTEXT SIZE: set to at least 6000.
MODEL: GPT 3.5 16k, GPT 4-1106 Preview(2023). Idk if JanitorLLM works too.
MAX NEW TOKENS: I always have it set to 300-500 tokens.
